payload.title: MTA Report - CRIME STATISTICS APRIL
payload.publisher: Police Department City of New York
payload.description: NYPD crime statistics report for MTA, covering April 2023 and January through April 2023, with comparison to 2022 figures. Includes major felony statistics, arrest/activity data, and Transit Bureau Hate Crimes statistics.

warnings: source.publisher is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Publisher has 39 accepted/canonical observations and should link to entity context when useful. Suggested relation: published_by.
